title: Peppery Silky Peppers Stir-fry
description: A vegan-friendly solo-dinner Argentinean dish featuring vegetable shortening for a unique texture and flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Slice the bell peppers into thin strips and add them to the pan. Cook for about 5 minutes until softened but still slightly crisp.
Add vegetable shortening to the pan, followed by salt and red pepper flakes. Stir well to combine ingredients.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until the peppers are evenly coated with the mixture and nicely flavored.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
